title: Distinct Subsequences Count
hints: Consider the last characters of s and t. How does matching or skipping the last character of s affect the count?
Define dp[i][j] as the number of ways t[:j] is a subsequence of s[:i]. Find the recurrence relation.
Initialize dp[0][0] to 1. Iterate through s and t, updating dp[i][j] based on whether s[i-1] equals t[j-1].
